name: Freddi's Fruit Cocktail Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6 oz) Frozen Orange Juice Concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and water. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add the frozen orange juice concentrate and frozen lemonade concentrate to the mixture. Stir well.
3. Add the watermelon, canteloupes, crenshaw melons, green grapes, peaches, and blueberries to the bowl. Mix gently until all fruit pieces are evenly distributed.
4. Allow the mixture to chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
